scope: Focused frontend UX/runtime regression for catalog, placements, and prices behavior only

storesTested.purpose: QA catalog/prices store with catalog endpoints returning 200
Active store without active catalog; verified UI error state for catalog/prices 404

checks.name: Product edit/detail navigation and browser back
checks.observation: Edit route opened product form; browser back restored products list.

checks.name: Category create duplicate-submit/cache invalidation
checks.observation: Double-click create produced one POST; new QA category rendered and persisted after refresh.

checks.name: Placement create duplicate-submit/cache invalidation
checks.observation: Double-click add produced one POST; placement/prices queries invalidated.

checks.name: Prices list rendering after placement mutation
checks.observation: Placed product appeared in prices table with editable price input.

checks.name: Price create/edit duplicate-submit/cache/refresh
checks.observation: Double-click save produced one PUT; refreshed input value matched API currentPrice.price.

checks.name: Invalid price UI behavior
checks.observation: Negative numeric value kept Save disabled; no invalid PUT was sent.

checks.name: Refresh/back-forward after edits
checks.observation: Products list back navigation restored list; store page refresh preserved created category, placement, and price state except BUG-UX-002 edit persistence failure.

checks.name: Archived/inactive product/category handling
checks.observation: Placement UI explicitly states archived/inactive products and categories are unavailable for active placements; active product selector excluded inactive/archived controls during tested flow.

checks.name: Operator assigned-store catalog behavior
checks.observation: Operator account showed Assigned stores page but no assigned stores available, so assigned-store catalog behavior could not be exercised. No admin-only create/global/user controls were shown on operator stores page.

checks.name: Unexpected network/runtime errors
checks.observation: No unexpected failed API requests during the final focused admin mutation pass. Expected unauthenticated session probes appeared only before login. Direct operator access to an unassigned store returned 403 as expected.

bugs.title: Category edit returns success but saved values are not persisted or rendered
